channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical News
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical headlines from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Says Xi Agrees Iran Must Open Hormuz Strait, China Says War Should Not Have Started
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Chinese President Xi Jinping agreed Tehran must reopen the Strait of Hormuz after their Beijing summit, though China gave no indication it would intervene militarily in the conflict.

item.title: 🛢️📉 Iraq Oil Exports Through Hormuz Drop 90% as Strait Blockade Bites
item.description: Iraq exported just 10 million barrels of oil through the Strait of Hormuz in April, down from about 93 million barrels monthly before the Iran conflict began, the country's new oil minister said, highlighting the severe impact on global energy flows.

item.title: 📈💰 US Treasury Yields Hit One-Year High as Oil Prices and Inflation Rattle Markets
item.description: U.S. Treasury yields climbed to their highest levels in a year as a spike in oil prices tied to Middle East energy disruptions, inflation concerns and expectations for a stronger economy led investors to reevaluate interest rate trajectories.

item.title: 🏦🇨🇳 Chinese Officials Meet Citigroup and Goldman Sachs CEOs in Beijing
item.description: China's securities regulator chairman and Beijing's party secretary held talks with Citigroup CEO Jane Fraser, discussing enhanced cooperation in wealth management and cross-border financing following the Trump-Xi summit.

item.title: 🥩🇺🇸🇨🇳 China Renews Export Licenses for 400+ US Beef Plants After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: China renewed export licenses that had expired for more than 400 U.S. beef plants, the Chinese customs website showed, a potential sign of thawing trade relations following the Beijing summit between Presidents Trump and Xi.

item.title: 🇨🇩🦠 Ebola Outbreak in Eastern Congo Kills 80, US CDC Monitoring
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo's Ituri province has killed at least 80 people, with 246 suspected cases identified. The US CDC is monitoring the situation and providing technical assistance to DRC and Uganda.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧🕊️ Israel and Lebanon Extend Ceasefire by 45 Days After US-Brokered Talks
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend their ceasefire by 45 days after Washington-mediated negotiations, with further meetings planned in coming weeks. The ceasefire has reduced conflict between Israel and Hezbollah in southern Lebanon.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ Trump's Geopolitical Brinkmanship Hits Wall With Iran
item.description: During his first year back in office, U.S. President Donald Trump's blustery negotiating style won him concessions from countries on issues ranging from tariffs to armed conflict. But with Iran, the approach has reached its limits.

item.title: 🇪🇸🎵 Spain Boycotts Eurovision Over Israel Participation, Joined by Ireland, Netherlands, Slovenia
item.description: Spain announced it will not participate in next year's Eurovision Song Contest over Israel's inclusion, joining Ireland, the Netherlands, and Slovenia in a growing boycott movement over Israel's military actions in Gaza and Lebanon.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇳🇬💥 Trump: US and Nigerian Forces Kill ISIS Second-in-Command Abu-Bilal al-Minuki
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, second in command of ISIS globally, was killed in a joint operation by U.S. and Nigerian forces. Trump called him "the world's most active terrorist."

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳✈️ Trump Announces \$54 Billion Boeing Deal After China Summit
item.description: President Donald Trump announced a major Boeing aircraft deal with China following his Beijing summit with Xi Jinping, though details remain unclear amid ongoing trade tensions between the two superpowers.

item.title: 🇰🇿🇹🇷 Kazakhstan and Turkey Recast Their Eurasian Role
item.description: Kazakhstan and Turkey are strengthening strategic cooperation as Central Asian nations navigate the shifting geopolitical landscape amid the Iran conflict and broader regional tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳🎯 Chinese Defense Firms Claim New Sniper Rifle Range Record
item.description: Chinese defense firms claim to have set new records for sniper rifle range, highlighting China's advances in precision weapons technology and its growing defense industry capabilities.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇩🇪🏭 Chinese Investor Acquires 120-Year-Old German Sewing Machine Maker
item.description: A Chinese investor has acquired the historic German sewing machine manufacturer, highlighting continued Chinese investment in European manufacturing despite geopolitical tensions.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦🕊️ Russia and Ukraine Swap 205 Prisoners of War Each
item.description: Russia and Ukraine exchanged 205 prisoners of war each in the latest swap linked to a three-day ceasefire brokered by President Donald Trump earlier in May 2026.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚠️ Zelenskiy: Russia Considering Attack on NATO Country from Belarus
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said Russia is seeking to draw Belarus deeper into its war in Ukraine and is weighing plans to attack Ukraine's north or a NATO country from Belarusian territory.

item.title: 🇸🇩⚔️ Sudan Military Uses Drones Against Paramilitary RSF as War Intensifies
item.description: Sudan's military has deployed drones against the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces as the civil war intensifies, with both sides fighting for control of Khartoum and other key regions.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇺🇸 Taiwan Says US Arms Sales Are Cornerstone of Regional Peace
item.description: Taiwan's defense ministry reiterated that U.S. arms sales are a cornerstone of regional peace and stability, following reports of potential changes to US defense commitments after Trump's China visit.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇳🇬 Trump: US Forces Kill "World's Most Active Terrorist" in Nigeria
item.description: President Trump announced that U.S. and Nigerian forces eliminated ISIS second-in-command Abu-Bilal al-Minuki in a joint counterterrorism operation in Nigeria.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🍃 Trump Warns Taiwan Against Independence After China Visit
item.description: President Donald Trump warned Taiwan against declaring formal independence after visiting Beijing, where Chinese leader Xi Jinping pressed him not to support the self-governing island's sovereignty.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🏛️ Xi Gives Trump Rare Tour of Secret Garden in Heart of Chinese Government
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping gave Donald Trump a rare tour of a secret garden in the heart of China's government compound, highlighting the pageantry of the Beijing summit that yielded few concrete outcomes.

item.title: 🇺🇦🏭 Ukraine Doubles Strikes on Russian Oil Refineries in 2026
item.description: Ukraine has stepped up drone attacks on Russia's energy infrastructure, doubling the number of oil refineries targeted since the start of 2026, according to information from Russian officials on social media.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇵🇭 Japan and Philippines Advance Missile Export Cooperation
item.description: Japan and the Philippines are advancing defense cooperation including missile exports as both nations strengthen military ties amid rising tensions with China in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Ukrainian Drones Hit Oil Refinery in Russia's Ryazan Region
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck an oil refinery in Russia's central city of Ryazan, the commander of the Ukrainian drone forces said Friday, continuing attacks on Russian energy infrastructure.

item.title: 🇩🇪🕵️ Germany Arrests Ukrainian National Suspected of Spying for Russia
item.description: German prosecutors said a German judge had enforced an arrest warrant against a Ukrainian national suspected of spying for Russia, amid ongoing concerns about foreign intelligence operations in Europe.
